html:
Exclusive to:

Restrained Static is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by successfully aiding and defending Wagstaff in a Moonstorm from the hostile Misshapen Birds and Moonblind Crows. Doing so will cause the Moonstorm to cease and reappear elsewhere on the map.

One Restrained Static is needed to build the final stage of the Lunar Siphonator.

After defeating the Celestial Champion, replaying the quest will be faster. Wagstaff will create Restrained Static more quickly, and players will only need to track him 1–2 times.

Energetic Static

This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion
Because Wagstaff will no longer appear in Moonstorms, players can use a Static Restrainer to catch an Unrestrained Static. This turns it into a stationary Energetic Static, starting the Moonstorm Quest, where it must be defended.

The Moonstorm Quest remains largely the same. Various Wagstaff Tools will spawn during the event. When an Energetic Static begins shaking, it can be given any of the Tools. If a Tool is not provided in time, or if the Energetic Static loses all of its health points, the Energetic Static is then destroyed, consuming the Static Restrainer which was used to capture it. Then, another Unrestrained Static will appear somewhere within the Moonstorm. Successfully completing the Moonstorm Quest will move the Moonstorm away from its current location.

Restrained Statics obtained this way have a different visual appearance from the ones Wagstaff makes. However, they still have the same exact function and usage.

Two Restrained Statics placed next to each other. The left one is from Wagstaff, and the right one is the crafted variant.

Usage

×2

Trivia

  • The Restrained Static was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.

Exclusive to:
“It makes my hair do crazy things.”
–Wilson
“It crackles, almost like a fire.”
–Willow
“Ha! Tiny spark is too weak to break out!”
–Wolfgang
“I can see a little spark inside.”
–Wendy
“IT IS CONTAINED”
–WX-78
“This device appears to keep the energy contained, somehow.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like bottled lightning.”
–Woodie
“There's power trapped inside.”
–Maxwell
“A strange pöwer rests inside.”
–Wigfrid
“It's like a big lightning bug stuck in a jar.”
–Webber
“What will we be cooking up with this, I wonder?”
–Warly
“Safe inside”
–Wormwood
“The boss really does have a gadget for everything.”
–Winona
“It makes my fur stand on end.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee! It can't get out!”
–Wurt
“You'll be shocked to see what's inside! Get it? Because there's static inside?”
–Walter
“Somewhat bridled energy.”
–Wanda

After defeating the Celestial Champion, replaying the quest will be faster. Wagstaff will create Restrained Static more quickly, and players will only need to track him 1–2 times.

'''Restrained Static''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is obtained by successfully aiding and defending [[Grainy Transmission|Wagstaff]] in a [[Moonstorm]] from the hostile [[Misshapen Bird]]s and [[Moonblind Crow]]s. Doing so will cause the Moonstorm to cease and reappear elsewhere on the map. 

One Restrained Static is needed to build the final stage of the [[Lunar Siphonator]].

After defeating the [[Celestial Champion]], replaying the quest will be faster. Wagstaff will create Restrained Static more quickly, and players will only need to track him 1–2 times.

==Energetic Static==
{{Post-Boss Content|Celestial Scion}}
Because [[Wagstaff]] will no longer appear in Moonstorms, players can use a [[Static Restrainer]] to catch an [[Unrestrained Static]]. This turns it into a stationary '''Energetic Static''', starting the Moonstorm Quest, where it must be defended.

The Moonstorm Quest remains largely the same. Various [[Grainy_Transmission#Tools|Wagstaff Tools]] will spawn during the event. When an Energetic Static begins shaking, it can be given any of the Tools. If a Tool is not provided in time, or if the Energetic Static loses all of its health points, the Energetic Static is then destroyed, consuming the Static Restrainer which was used to capture it. Then, another Unrestrained Static will appear somewhere within the Moonstorm. Successfully completing the Moonstorm Quest will move the Moonstorm away from its current location.

Restrained Statics obtained this way have a different visual appearance from the ones Wagstaff makes. However, they still have the same exact function and usage.

[[File:Restrained_Statics_Placed.png|400px|thumb|left|Two Restrained Statics placed next to each other. The left one is from Wagstaff, and the right one is the crafted variant.]]

{{clear}}

}}

|tool = Notional Fabricator

}}
